'''Drovian''' was the language of the [[Drovian]] species native to [[Nim Drovis]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> As a result of their prolonged war, the Drovians adopted [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] as their primary language.

==Drovian words==
*'''Chunder''': Used to express one's immense dislike of something<ref name="PoT">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1998-07-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''
